channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Communal stairs remain in dirty state, 13th May
item.description:
The stairs of 1-30 Arnold Estate (Jamaica Rd stairwell, SE1 2DL) have still not been cleaned to standard despite multiple reports. Visible staining remains from a dirty liquid spilt all the way down.montgs ago. They need to be properly cleaned with an appropriate detergent and /or power washed. This is my final time reporting this problem for attention before I make a formal complaint if it is not rectified.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-30, Jamaica Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 13th May
item.description:
Fly tipping again. Same thing everyday!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lucey Way, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree branches on verge, 13th May
item.description:
Please remove these tree branches from the verge. They were in the road causing a danger to traffic. The tree also needs pruning; it overshadows no, 15 and also spreads out over the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen's Mead Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking !!!!!!, 13th May
item.description:
I am gonna speak to DVLA or anyone parking here is getting a bloody joke sort it out now 5 spaces for cars and yellow lines the rest sort it out I won't stop till I get parking out side my house Greenwich council what a joke you are
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Godstow Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous pavement, 13th May
item.description:
For the past year building works have taken place at 68 Pickhurst Park and lorries etc have crossed the pavement into the front garden. Leaving the pavement in an extremely dangerous condition.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 62, Pickhurst Park, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bikes not parked in bays, 13th May
item.description:
Few unattended bikes left outside the street and not parked in an appropriate bay.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-10, Keeley Street, Holborn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and abandoned vehicle, 13th May
item.description:
This van has been parked and left her for months if not over a year, people are now dumping rubbish and mattresses behind it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gwillim Close, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road gulley blocked, 13th May
item.description:
When is rainy there is a lake and it's difficult to cross the Pinnacle Hill road and we need to go with kids close to cars going on the main Watling Street. It's a bit dangerous.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pinnacle Hill, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hasn’t moved from this bay in weeks, 13th May
item.description:
Unsure if still cared fo as it has been say there such a long yime

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Craigton Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Residential bin not collected for months, 13th May
item.description:
The residential waste bins in this building have not been collected for months, residents continue to raise as an issue with council and the building manager.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Whiston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Somebody has dumped a mattress on the walkway/pavement next to 17 Burham Close, 13th May
item.description:
I found it there this afternoon. Wed 13/5/26

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Frant Close, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Another day another pile of rubbish, 13th May
item.description:
Thought it might have gone by pick up.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lawrence Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Polling stations signs, 13th May
item.description:
Two polling station metal signs from the Brigadier Hill polling station last week. Also a couple of laminated signs tied to the fence.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cedar Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Barriers, equipment or materials left on the highway

item.title: Panfield road oposite thames water pumping station, 13th May
item.description:
A plastic chair ,cut down tree and a xmas tree in box . Been there for 2 months
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sewell Road, Abbey Wood

item.title: Blocked drain. Rainwater not flowing into it., 13th May
